frameworks.name: visual metacognition
frameworks.one_line: Field-level focus on metacognitive processes in visual perception.

frameworks.name: consensus science
frameworks.one_line: Community goal-setting process borrowed from mature sciences.

core_question: What long-term and medium-term goals should the field of visual metacognition collectively pursue?
key_assumptions: Psychological sciences lag mature sciences in identifying key questions.
Coordinated agendas reduce isolated, niche research efforts.
interpretations: 26 researchers reached consensus on four long-term and two medium-term goals for visual metacognition.
Consensus building around common goals could be adopted more widely in psychological science if successful.
